source: A : Kids just do n't have as many cavities anymore , so the next 20 years will be fascinating because dentistry is going to be totally different . However , I 'm in an age group in which people still need the dentist . Even if they do n't have dental problems , people have the disposable income to concentrate on bright , straight smiles -- maybe that 's all there will be to do in 20 years , who knows ? On the other hand , I 've seen research saying that roughly 50 percent of people do n't go to the dentist -- at least not regularly . That 's a huge untapped market .
domestication: 孩子们现在的蛀牙问题已经不如以前那么严重了，所以未来二十年会非常有趣，因为牙科领域将会变得完全不同。不过，我现在属于那个仍需要看牙医的年龄段。即使人们没有牙齿问题，他们也有足够的闲钱来让自己拥有洁白、笔直的笑容——也许二十年后，这就是牙医唯一要做的事情，谁知道呢？另一方面，我看到了一些研究，表明大约50%的人不去看牙医——至少不是定期去。这是一个巨大的潜在市场，实在令人惊讶，有这么多人都没有得到牙科服务。
foreignization: A：孩子们不再有这么多蛀牙，所以接下来的20年将会很有趣，因为牙科将会变得完全不同。然而，我处于一个仍需要看牙医的人的年龄段。即使他们没有牙齿问题，人们有足够的可支配收入来关注洁白、笔直的笑容——也许在20年后，这将是唯一要做的事情，谁知道呢？另一方面，我看到过研究表明，大约50%的人不去看牙医——至少不是定期去。那是一个巨大的未开发市场。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

A : Kids just do n't have as many cavities anymore , so the next 20 years will be fascinating because dentistry is going to be totally different . However , I 'm in an age group in which people still need the dentist . Even if they do n't have dental problems , people have the disposable income to concentrate on bright , straight smiles -- maybe that 's all there will be to do in 20 years , who knows ? On the other hand , I 've seen research saying that roughly 50 percent of people do n't go to the dentist -- at least not regularly . That 's a huge untapped market .

source: Indonesian President Suharto cut short an official visit to Egypt and flew home to deal with the growing street violence in Jakarta , Yogyakarta , and other cities . Another protester - the seventh in two days - was killed in the rioting . Meanwhile , analysts warned that if the unrest topples Suharto - with the Army seizing power - it also could wreck the $ 38 billion international bailout of Indonesia 's battered economy .
domestication: 印度尼西亚总统苏哈托原本在埃及进行国事访问，但突然中断行程，飞回国内处理雅加达、日惹等城市日益严重的街头暴力事件。暴乱中又有一名抗议者丧生，这两天里已经有七人遇害。与此同时，分析人士警告说，如果动乱导致苏哈托下台，军方夺权，那么这将可能使印度尼西亚38亿美元的国际救助计划付诸东流。
foreignization: 印尼总统苏哈托提前结束了对埃及的正式访问，飞回印度尼西亚处理雅加达、日惹和其他城市日益增长的街头暴力。又有一名抗议者——两天内第七人——在骚乱中被杀。与此同时，分析人士警告说，如果动乱推翻苏哈托——军队夺权——也可能会使得国际社会38亿美元的对印度尼西亚经济救援化为泡影。

source: When I downloaded and installed Windows Live Mail on my Vista and XP machines , setting up email accounts ( including Hotmail ) took just about 10 seconds each . There 's no limit on the number of email addresses that you can add to Windows Live Mail , as was also the case with Outlook Express . source: The US Antitrust restrictions already placed on sales of Micro-soft 's Windows software do not extend to Windows 98 , a federal appeals court in Washington ruled . But Sun Micro-systems asked a US judge in San Jose , Calif. , to force changes in Windows 98 or block its release . In addition , the Justice Department and a group of states investigating Microsoft were reportedly preparing a new antitrust complaint that could interfere with this week 's planned shipment of Windows 98 to computermakers .

source: It 's about time someone spoke out about this inane drug war as Ed Quillen did in his July 12 column ( " Can anybody tell us what victory means in this longest war ? " ) . In the past , the media ( free public service announcements ) and the government at all levels have acted as though there were only one side to this issue . All of a sudden , the public seems to be waking up and listening to the other side . Do n't get me wrong - I 'm not in favor of kids or adults abusing drugs . Been there , done that ! I 'm lucky to have survived . But the fact is , the current " cure " is worse than the disease .

source: When ready to bake , have ready a baking sheet lined with parchment paper or lightly sprinkled with cornmeal or flour . Place the dough on a very lightly floured counter and , using your fingertips , flatten the dough gently and shape it into a round ball or a football shape . Transfer it to the baking sheet , cover with an overturned large container or an oiled piece of plastic wrap and set aside to rise until the dough has almost doubled in size . ( Gently press a finger into the center of the dough ; if the depression fills in very slowly , it should be ready . )
domestication: 开始烘焙时，要准备一张铺有烘焙纸或轻轻撒上玉米粉的烘焙盘。在一个很少撒面粉的台面上，轻轻地把面团按平，然后把它塑造成圆球形或者橄榄球形。把面团搬移到烘焙盘上，用一个大的容器盖住或者盖上一层抹了油的保鲜膜，让它静置一会儿，等到面团的体积几乎增加一倍就行了。（轻轻地用手指按一下面团中心，如果出现的凹陷很慢才恢复，那么就说明面团已经发好了。）

source: According to Joe Mattes , vice president of e-commerce at Turner Sports , Earnhardt Jr. , Gordon and Stewart rank as the top three in sales at NASCAR.com . Earnhardt remains a top-10 seller , but Mattes said the revenue is spread more evenly than 10 years ago , when there was a drop-off in demand beyond the late superstar 's products .
domestication: 据特纳体育电子商务副总裁乔·马特斯说，在NASCAR.com上，厄尔纳哈特二世、戈登和斯图尔特是销量排名前三的车手。尽管厄尔纳哈特仍然是销量前十名的车手，但马特斯表示，与十年前相比，现在的销售额更为均衡。当时，超级明星的产品之后，销量会直线下降。现在虽然厄尔纳哈特仍然很受欢迎，但其他车手的商品也逐渐受到欢迎，销售额变得更加分散。

source: To catch smuggled weapons , visitors are searched before entering the jails and employees pass through metal detectors , or magnometers . But in October , when Correction Department investigators conducted a surprise check of the staff entrances at nine Rikers jails , they found the magnometers were not on at three of the jails , according to a report on the examination . At six of the jails , investigators noted , the staff members were not accustomed to regular searches . Officers have since been retrained in security procedures , an official said .
domestication: 为了防止走私武器，监狱对入内的访客进行搜身检查，而职员们则必须通过金属探测器。但是十月份的时候，惩教部门的调查员对九所赖克斯岛监狱的员工出入口进行了突然检查，结果发现其中三个监狱的金属探测器竟然没有开启。报告中称，在另外六所监狱，工作人员也已经习惯性地不进行例行搜查了。据一位官员说，相关的警员已经接受了安全程序的重新培训。总之，这件事暴露了监狱管理上的一些漏洞，不过现在问题已经得到了解决。
